title: YOUTH FAMILY SERVICES - 211info
text: NEXT DOOR WASCO YOUTH FAMILY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support services, including counseling, support groups, violence and anger prevention training, life skills groups, parenting classes, new parenting groups, crime victims support, community information and referral and temporary housing. 1113 Kelly Avenue The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Ages 6-21 and their families Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 296-8118 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 296-8118 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to enroll FEES: Call for information DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Hood River and Wasco Counties Services: Alcohol Use Disorder Education/Prevention Substance Use Disorder Intervention Programs * Substance Use Disorder Counselors Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - HEALTH PROMOTION AND CHRONIC DISEASE PREVENTION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - GORGE YOUTH MENTORING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - INDEPENDENT LIVING PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - MID-COLUMBIA HEALTH EQUITY ADVOCATES MATERIAL GOODS - CLOTHING AND TOYS CLOSET If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEXT DOOR WASCO
